task_description:
设计一个《无畏契约战绩分析》网页的主页设计图（PNG格式）。要求：1) 现代电竞风格设计，配色使用深蓝+金黄+霓虹蓝；2) 顶部导航栏包含：游戏logo、导航菜单（主页/战绩/排行榜/直播）、用户登录按钮；3) 大背景banner展示该游戏元素、标题和"分析我的战绩"按钮；4) 中间主要内容区域分三列：左侧近期战绩快速预览、中间核心数据面板（胜率、KDA、主玩角色）、右侧排行榜Top5；5) 底部footer包含关于、隐私政策、社区链接。要求专业、现代、易用，保存到 ~/Desktop/valorant_stats_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.summary:
```json
{
  "reasoning": "这是一个网页设计任务，需要生成现代电竞风格的《无畏契约战绩分析》主页设计图。我将使用Python + PIL库直接绘制高质量的设计图，包含导航栏、banner、三列内容区和footer。这样能快速生成PNG文件并保存到指定路径。",
  "action_type": "create_and_run_script",
  "params": {
    "language": "python",
    "code": "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建高分辨率设计图 (1920x1200px)
width, height = 1920, 1200
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#0a0e27')  # 深蓝底色
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 颜色定义
color_dark_blue = '#0a0e27'
color_navy = '#1a1f3a'
color_gold = '#d4af37'
color_neon_blue = '#00d4ff'
color_text_light = '#e8e8e8'
color_accent_purple = '#9d4edd'
color_success = '#00ff41'
color_danger = '#ff006e'

# ===== 1. 顶部导航栏 =====
navbar_height = 70
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, navbar_height)], fill=color_navy)

# 导航栏分隔线
draw.line([(0, navbar_height), (width, navbar_height)], fill=color_neon_blue, width=2)

# 试图加载字体（有则用，无则用默认）
try:
    font_bold = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 24)
    font_nav = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 16)
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 48)
    font_subtitle = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 20)
    font_body = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 14)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 12)
except:
    font_bold = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_nav = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_title = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_subtitle = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_body = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_small = ImageFont.load_default()

# Logo区域
draw.text((40, 20), "VALORANT", fill=color_gold, font=font_bold)
draw.text((50, 48), "STATS", fill=color_neon_blue, font=font_nav)

# 导航菜单
nav_items = ["主页", "战绩", "排行榜", "直播"]
nav_x = 400
for item in nav_items:
    draw.text((nav_x, 25), item, fill=color_text_light, font=font_nav)
    nav_x += 120

# 登录按钮 (右上角)
login_btn_x1, login_btn_y1 = 1700, 15
login_btn_x2, login_btn_y2 = 1880, 65
draw.rectangle([(login_btn_x1, login_btn_y1), (login_btn_x2, login_btn_y2)], outline=color_neon_blue, width=2)
draw.text((1720, 25), "登 录", fill=color_neon_blue, font=font_nav)

# ===== 2. Banner区域 =====
banner_start = navbar_height
banner_height = 350
banner_end = banner_start + banner_height

# Banner背景渐变效果（从深蓝到紫）
for y in range(banner_start, banner_end):
    ratio = (y - banner_start) / banner_height
    r = int(10 + (157 - 10) * ratio)
    g = int(14 + (78 - 14) * ratio)
    b = int(39 + (221 - 39) * ratio)
    color = f'#{r:02x}{g:02x}{b:02x}'
    try:
        draw.line([(0, y), (width, y)], fill=color)
    except:
        pass

# Banner装饰元素（几何形状）n
draw.rectangle([(100, 120), (200, 180)], outline=color_neon_blue, width=3)
draw.rectangle([(1700, 150), (1850, 280)], outline=color_gold, width=2)
draw.polygon([(300, 100), (400, 150), (350, 250)], outline=color_accent_purple, width=2)

# Banner主标题
draw.text((300, 180), "无畏契约战绩分析", fill=color_gold, font=font_title)
draw.text((320, 250), "实时数据 · 深度分析 · 登顶排名", fill=color_neon_blue, font=font_subtitle)

# "分析我的战绩"按钮
btn_x1, btn_y1 = 320, 310
btn_x2, btn_y2 = 520, 360
draw.rectangle([(btn_x1, btn_y1), (btn_x2, btn_y2)], fill=color_neon_blue, outline=color_gold, width=2)
draw.text((345, 320), "分析我的战绩", fill=color_dark_blue, font=font_bold)

# ===== 3. 中间内容区域（三列布局）=====
content_start = banner_end
content_height = 500
content_end = content_start + content_height

# 左侧：近期战绩快速预览
left_col_x1, left_col_y1 = 40, content_start + 20
left_col_x2, left_col_y2 = 580, content_end - 20

# 左侧背景
draw.rectangle([(left_col_x1, left_col_y1), (left_col_x2, left_col_y2)], fill=color_navy, outline=color_gold, width=2)

# 左侧标题
draw.text((60, 45 + content_start), "近期战绩", fill=color_gold, font=font_bold)
draw.line([(60, 75 + content_start), (540, 75 + content_start)], fill=color_neon_b

action_checkpoints.reasoning: LLM 返回了纯文本回复，已作为最终回复。
